title: pavonia sancti
intro: Pavonia sancti is a flowering plant species in the mallow family, scientifically known as Pavonia sainta, also referred to as Rock Rose or Mountain Rose. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal medicine, particularly in Latin American and Caribbean cultures, for their medicinal and health benefits. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Pavonia sancti can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments.
